review_title: AutoEntry: The Key to Effortless Data Entry
description: Overall, AutoEntry has been a valuable asset for our organization. Its ability to quickly and accurately process financial documents, integration with popular accounting software, and OCR technology has greatly improved our data entry processes.
author: Kavindu Githsara K.
pros: As a general user of AutoEntry within my organization, I have found it to be a reliable and user-friendly tool for automating our data entry processes. One of the greatest advantages of this software is its ability to quickly and accurately process invoices, receipts, and other financial documents. This has greatly improved our efficiency and has saved a significant amount of time for our team. Additionally, the software's OCR (Optical Character Recognition) technology is highly accurate and has made it easy to extract data from various types of documents.
cons: A potential downside of using AutoEntry is that it may require some time and effort to set up the software and customize it to fit our specific needs. Also, some advanced features such as budgeting and forecasting may require additional tools or custom development.

review_title: Well structured, easy and efficient program
description: As an overall experience i would say it is very good and i would recommend it to any other colleagues that work in other companies
author: Mariel H.
pros: The process is clear and easy to follow, further more the team is extremely helpful, and the instructions are excellent. Initially, I had to focus while using it, but within a few days, I became familiar. The program has streamlined the supplier invoice process, making it user-friendly and saving the company time and money.
cons: The customer service support needs to be more effective and supportive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Give it a try!
description: Great support to set all the account set up. The app was so easy to use and all scanning feature was wonderful
author: Robin N.
pros: I enjoyed having all my recipes in the same place. The scanning work well in the app. Uploading in the app always worked well.
cons: It did not seem to remember my last account coding and HST set up, therefore I had to keep saving it.

review_title: Not really impressed at all
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The idea is good... execution terrible. Its a real pity I was looking forward to using it, but not likely.
cons: The navigation around the app is very unintuitive, I have only tried 2 documents on the trial and had multiple issues that had to be fixed in the back end by support staff... to be honest it would have been quicker to just capture direct. There's no batch edit, weird constraints... overall unimpressed.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Provides lots of tools to automate entry of data
author: John C.
pros: The price point can not be beat. Provides a whole lot of value for the cost
cons: Documentation could be better. So features are more useful than others. Data extraction could be faster

review_title: Change how you deal with clients and your own accounts
description: Cut down on time spent on repetitive and labourious tasks to free up staff to work on higer paid tasks such as accounts preparation instead of record-keeping
author: EAMON O.
pros: Easy to use New users are enthusiastic about the package Inexperienced users can make progress on data entry the package skims documents to pick up dates and amounts but also picks up on invoices where the invoice is entered twice and points out duplicates At the end of the accounts process everyone can log in and view an image of the actual invoice uploaded thereby cutting down on verbal explanations and long conversations and misunderstandings
cons: Possibly too easy to use Users sometimes click an invoice as paid which causes complications later

review_title: Published Supplier invoices not attaching in Sage One
description: Started off well, until published supplier invoices stopped attaching in Sage One
author: Michael B.
pros: It started off working well, well priced, allows multiple entities and Users on one account.
cons: Published Supplier invoices not attaching in Sage One for 4 weeks now

review_title: Our experience with AE
author: Trevor D.
pros: Clear , links will in accounting products. Our staff are uploading their invoices and coding on line. Much better than paper invoices floating around.
cons: Could do with expenses being a little more clear on the page for people not frequently in AE, they have a little trouble getting used to how to do their staff expenses - but we are getting there. Also some features like when an invoice was paid by debit card or credit card. not yet available for Sage users but on the development list. Now owned by Sage I expect it will work even better with sage as time goes on.

review_title: Given my team some time back in the day.
description: This has saved us hours of data entry and irradiated typos when entering bank statements and invoices.
author: Joyce O.
pros: The ease in which bank statements can be converted in to a Excel spreadsheet or downloaded in to the accounting software
cons: It would be good if departments could be allocated for Sage Accounting

review_title: Two days Wasted!
author: Debra K.
pros: What? That is it - I have nothing say that is good.
cons: I am new - Two days later, over 8 hours on chat support and it is still not working.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Same service issues every month please address the issues and guarantee stability with your software
description: when I first made the decision to use Autoentry it seemed to be effortless and started helping with Carbon footprint and reducing the need to keep paper records, which is where we all want to be and still conforms with HMRC record keeping guidelines. Over 2021 and more so the last 6 months continuous issued with publishing between Xero and Autoentry, and Xero is my preferred choice software. I have questioned since they were brought out by Sage the service would improve however the service levels and functionality and stability are getting worse month by month.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to set up and an efficient way to keep digital records and very useful having a copy of Invoice attached to the transaction. Very smart way if ever having to go back on an Invoice for a query of useful data
cons: Over the last few months Autoentry and Xero do not sync and publish. For customers delivering paperwork last minute results in fines from HMRC for late Vat filing. Having to keep unsyncing deleting the app and re setting up. Month after month this is now becoming an issue and not helping cut down on processing time. Raise the same issues to autoentry every month and they may tweak the settings but these are not a long term fix. I only use Xero as the integrated supplier and over 2021 this is happening on a regular basis. I have become so familiar with the process to disconnect and reconnect for a short term solution.

review_title: Good pricing structure and features, but could do with more development
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The pricing structure for AutoEntry is spot on in terms of paying what you use and carrying over of credits. AutoEntry copes very well with bulk invoices and has a good range of 'rules' to code the transactions. Once rules are set up, they are applied to the inbox instantly, so mass processing for bulk invoices is very efficient. AutoEntry copes with complex tax summaries and foreign currency quite well. Another unique feature, as compared to Receipt Bank, is the ability to process sales invoices. Some of our clients use 3rd party software to raise invoices, which does not integrate with the accounting software, so AutoEntry provides a cost-efficient 'bridge' between the two. Bank statement processing is unique and quite quick, but does require good resolution scans. The ability to import digitised bank statements directly into the accounting software (we use Xero) is excellent.
cons: We have had some issues with the app, where receipts go 'pending' and never make it to the software. Because of the bugs in the app and the client experience, we stopped using AutoEntry for some clients, but it remains the software of choice for internal processing. The functionality of the app is very limited - there is no editing or leaving notes, it is simply view and publish. OCR technology is not as powerful as, for example, Receipt Bank, so some supplier details are not picked out accurately. The support team are sometimes slow to respond (sometimes in excess of 72 hours) and some of our issues didn't get a satisfactory resolution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Automation of data entry
description: It was good but it's not perfect enough as it has some lags
author: Gabriel A.
pros: Simple to use and is fast to us, any person with little accounting skills can still use it
cons: The only con, on my part is for you to use the product you have to pay, I wish that sometimes it should be free

review_title: Autoentry - a great choice of OCR software
description: Great all-rounder and the perfect partner to an accountancy/bookkeeping practice.
author: Natasha E.
pros: I like the fact it is affordable, it has supplier statement reconciliations and that it works with a number of accounting solutions
cons: Credits have an expiry date to them. It would be better if they were available until you needed them
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Brilliant
description: Have been using Autoentry for about six years and now work much more accurately and efficiently. Find it very easy to use and the support is always very good when issues arise. Took on additional clients as a result of the time savings gained
author: Karen S.
pros: Easy to use and teach clients Integrates smoothly with the other I use
cons: Has most desired features Easy to use Doesnt always integrate well with Sage desktop

review_title: Dependable product
author: Amit K.
pros: E-mail forwarding of invoices makes it easy to operate this on the go. Also, the fact that it remembers what you previously categorised a similar invoice as, saves time over the long term.
cons: The expenses feature is slightly convoluted. Still haven't been able to fully understand that.

review_title: A great time saver that is simple to use and cuts down on paper usage / wastage.
author: Nicholas R.
pros: What I love most about Auto-entry is that it saves a great deal of time, has improved input accuracy and reduces the need to print off invoices as it saves a copy to Xero (Excellent feature).
cons: Struggles a bit with long itemised bills / invoices - In particular phone bills. This is mitigated by the excellent support I receive from the AutoEntry staff.

review_title: Game changing product but very slow response to customer queries
author: James H.
pros: 1) All round ease of use and beautiful UI 2) The fact a scan of documents is stored for quick access
cons: 1) Customer service is extremely slow, response times to the web chat are sometimes days or weeks 2) Integration to Sage 50 seems to have some intermittant drops requiring reintegration

review_title: Huge time saver on entry and reduced purchase invoice duplication and errors
description: Overall, hugely improved the supplier invoice process, easy to use. Resolved duplicate invoices being entered and saved the company time and money. Massive time saver on employee expenses entry as each individual submits their own expense and is easy to check and approve.
author: Hiten S.
pros: Integration with sage was seamless, setting up myself was a doddle and customer service is great as issues get resolved quickly. Huge time saver as we no longer have to use sage batches and also didn't need to have a separate screen to view the PDF invoices on entry as it's all in one screen on autoentry. One of the best features is viewing the invoice directly on sage using the onedrive link. Before this, we had to search the supplier repository on the server. It also helped reduce errors as it detects duplicates, autodetects the supplier and has a learning feature too.
cons: Can be slow at times and if not used for a few days, the service needs to be restarted. This results in invoices getting stuck until the service is refreshed, however as long as it's used constantly this can be avoided.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Auto Entry
author: Marie C.
pros: I like that my clients can upload all their receipts and invoices. Very little paper and storage of files. I also find that my clients do not lose receipts as often.
cons: When I send the link to a client to download the app and sign in there seems to some difficulty in getting them signed up. It seems like my client ends up having to sign off then back on and reset pin number.

review_title: Brilliant app which integrates with xero
description: Autoentry are constantly updating the app. They also have a great support team who regularly contact us to make sure everythink is ok
author: Paddy G.
pros: Autoentry has transformed our outsourced bookkeeping and accounting services. Customer support from the Autoentry team is excellent

review_title: A real time saver
author: Katriona R.
pros: I like the pricing structure, in that you are paying for what you use and not per client. I also like the fact that AE will scan in bank statements - I have clients who won't use bank feeds or allow me access to their accounts to import statements - Paper is still the way for them!!
cons: The one thing I would like from Auto Entry is the ability to forward client emails with invoice attachments or if the client has scanned and emailed an invoice to me. I have to print off the attachment or the scanned in invoice, scan it again and then email on to auto entry, no time saving here. An Auto Entry App would be great so that I or the client could capture the image of the document and send straight to Auto Entry (See Datamolino App)

review_title: Great product
author: Iain E.
pros: AutoEntry has really improved our efficiency – the pricing structure is good as you only pay for what you use across all clients, brilliant for seasonal clients with peaks and troughs in activity. One of the best features is that you can upload bank statements and access them in various file types including csv. I have recommended it to all clients for the time savings alone.
cons: Would be handy to have a pricing plan below Bronze for the very small companies who may only have a few invoices per month

review_title: Good software
description: the business problem is solving but still can get better
author: Prachi G.
pros: The development team is very helpful, customised accordind to business
cons: the images are blurry sometimes and the system is down and does not post invoices on sage right away

review_title: Marvelous user friendly app!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use fantastic little app for bookkeepers/accountants like me. Bank statements are processed quickly and are usually accurate, saving me many hours that I would rather spend analysing transactions instead of manually typing them. Goodbye manual input!
cons: When converting bank statements, there are occasional incorrect figures. However this is very rare and forgivable. The pros of time-saving still outweigh this con.
